---
id: handle-report-link
title: "Report a link for abuse"
description: "Submits an abuse report for a link. Accepts both authenticated and anonymous submissions. Duplicate reports for the same link, reason, and reporter within 24 hours are rejected"
sidebar_label: "Report a link for abuse"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

  children={"Report a link for abuse"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/reports/links"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Submits an abuse report for a link. Accepts both authenticated and anonymous submissions. Duplicate reports for the same link, reason, and reporter within 24 hours are rejected
